name: context-engineering
description: Context engineering skills for building production-grade AI agent systems, covering fundamentals, degradation patterns, compression, optimization, multi-agent coordination, memory systems, tool design, evaluation, and more.

interface.shortDescription: Skill bundle for building stronger agent systems.
interface.longDescription: A bundled set of context engineering skills for production-grade AI agent systems, including context design, compression, evaluation, memory, tool design, and multi-agent coordination patterns.
defaultPrompt: Explain the main context failure modes in long agent runs.
Design a memory and context strategy for a coding agent.
Recommend context compression patterns for a multi-agent workflow.
